title: baphia massaiensis subsp. cornifolia
intro: Baphia massaiensis subsp. cornifolia, also known as Corniflower, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Baphia massaiensis subsp. cornifolia include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. In traditional herbal medicine, Baphia massaiensis subsp. cornifolia is prepared in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health ailments.
